'''Gyle''' was an [[Elder (Melodie)|Elder]] of the [[Melodie]] species and the father of [[Lyric]]. During their journey to [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]], it was from him and another Melodie named [[Aragon]] that the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] learned of the existence of ancient [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] carvings which provided information on the origins of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] malevont [[Golden Globe]] and the prisoners that were trapped within it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}}
